title: Air barrier assembly shall achieve maximum air leakage rate of 0.04 cfm/sf at 1.57 psf pressure differential

performance_criteria.continuity_requirement: continuous across all control layer transitions

notes: Air barrier performance requirement per ASHRAE 90.1 Section 5.4.3.1. Assembly-level testing required per ASTM E2357. Climate Zone 5A requires continuous air barrier with this performance threshold. Continuity at roof-to-wall transitions, fenestration perimeters, and penetrations is critical. Specification addresses field of wall but does not detail transition sequencing at fenestration — see related ambiguity in REQ-07-2700-003.
